summary: Matriz Dinámica de Producción - NEW FEATURES (Column Merge + Rich Detail Modal) fully tested. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified including enriched modal content, column merge/undo, localStorage persistence, and navigation buttons.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/matriz returns enriched detalle with curva, curva_detalle, hilo_especifico
Backend: Detalle includes dias_proceso, ult_mov_servicio, ult_mov_fecha
Backend: Detalle includes diferencia_acumulada, total_movimientos
Backend: curva_detalle is array of {talla, cantidad} objects
Backend: All 27 pytest tests passed (100%)
Frontend: Click on cell value (e.g., Costura=2) opens modal showing only registros in that estado
Frontend: Click on item name opens modal showing ALL registros for that item
Frontend: Click on total value opens modal showing ALL registros for that item
Frontend: Modal shows n_corte with estado badge
Frontend: Modal shows Modelo, Ruta, Prendas, Curva fields
Frontend: Modal shows Hilo Específico (e.g., 'Beis', 'Negro')
Frontend: Modal shows Entrega date in red when overdue (2026-02-20)
Frontend: Modal shows Días (dias_proceso) with clock icon
Frontend: Modal shows Movimientos count (total_movimientos)
Frontend: Modal shows Último mov with servicio name and date
Frontend: Modal shows Diferencia/Merma when > 0
Frontend: Modal shows curva_detalle as talla×cantidad chips (28×185, 30×150, etc.)
Frontend: Modal shows URGENTE badge for urgent registros
Frontend: Modal shows DIV badge for es_hijo registros (fraccionados)
Frontend: Modal Trazabilidad button navigates to /reportes/trazabilidad/{id}
Frontend: Modal Abrir button navigates to /registros/editar/{id}
Frontend: Column merge mode - click Columnas > Fusionar columnas activates merge UI
Frontend: Merge UI shows 'Selecciona 2+ columnas. La primera será la que absorbe a las demás.'
Frontend: Select 2+ columns and Apply merges them (Acabado + Limpieza tested)
Frontend: After merge, absorbed column disappears from table
Frontend: After merge, target column header shows +absorbed name (e.g., 'Costura +Para Costura')
Frontend: Merge badge appears in toolbar with undo (X) button
Frontend: Column count updates after merge (14/14 → 13/14)
Frontend: Undo merge (X button) restores the absorbed column
Frontend: Column count restores after undo (13/14 → 14/14)
Frontend: Merge preferences persist in localStorage key 'matriz-produccion-prefs'
Frontend: localStorage stores merged columns in 'merged' field
Frontend: Clicking merged column cell shows merged names in modal title (→ Costura (+Para Costura))
Frontend: 'Deshacer fusiones' button in column config undoes all merges
critical_code_review_comments: Backend LATERAL JOINs for ult_mov, diferencia, hilo_especifico are efficient and correct
Frontend DetalleModal component is well-structured with all enriched fields displayed
Column merge logic correctly handles nested merges (if absorbed column was target of another merge)
localStorage persistence works correctly with ruta-specific preferences
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 4 active registros (02=Atraque/Ojal with 3 movimientos, 03=Estampado with hilo_especifico='Negro', 04=Costura padre with 2 movimientos and hilo_especifico='Beis', 04-1=Costura hijo DIV with hilo_especifico='Beis'). Curva detalle has talla×cantidad for all.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matriz Dinámica de Producción fully implemented with TWO NEW FEATURES: 1) Column Merge - allows merging columns (e.g., Acabado absorbs Limpieza), values are summed, persisted in localStorage. 2) Rich Detail Modal - click on cell/item/total opens modal with enriched data: n_corte, estado badge, modelo, ruta, prendas, curva, hilo_especifico, entrega (red if overdue), dias_proceso, movimientos, ultimo_mov, diferencia, curva_detalle chips, urgente/DIV badges, Trazabilidad and Abrir buttons. Test file updated: /app/backend/tests/test_matriz_produccion.py with 27 tests including new enriched field tests.
